description_long: This bungalow features a simple, modern rectangular design with a flat roof and clean lines. The front facade includes two large, horizontally-aligned windows with wooden frames and a central entrance door, providing ample natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a uniform gray tone, and the structure sits on a green base representing a lawn or yard. On one side, three vertical panels or screens are positioned, possibly as decorative or privacy elements, while the rear view shows additional patterned panels. The windows and doors are clearly defined, and the overall structure is single-story with no visible porch. The minimalistic style and flat roof suggest a contemporary architectural influence.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large front windows, and a gray exterior, set on a green lawn. Decorative panels are present on the sides and rear.
description_view_0: The front view shows two large windows with wooden frames, a central entrance door, and a flat roof.
description_view_1: The rear view displays three decorative panels with different patterns and a solid gray wall with no windows.
description_view_2: The side view reveals a single window and an open door, with the flat roof extending across the structure.
description_view_3: The opposite side view features two large windows and a small window, with three vertical panels visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and side windows
